title: Ubiquiti UVC-G4-PTZ - UniFi Outdoor 4K PTZ camera
description: UniFi Protect G4 PTZ is a high-performance pan-tilt-zoom camera with 4K, 24 FPS video streaming, 22x optical zoom , and adaptive IR LED night vision for 100 m distance G4 PTZ is a superior surveillance camera for shopping centers, parking lots, airports, train stations, and other transportation hubs. Pairing G4 PTZâs advanced optical and video technologies with UniFi Protectâs ease of use creates a unique solution for the most demanding environments. G4 PTZ comes with IP66 weatherproof casing and flexible powering options 4K, 24 FPS video stream 22x optical zoom with F1.5 lens Tamper-resistant pan and tilt with servo feedback Multi-exposure HDR Adaptive IR LEDs, night vision distance up to 100 m Flexible power options: 802.3bt PoE++ IP66 weatherproof rating Operating temperature -40° to + 50°C (-40° to +122°F) Managed by UniFi Protect software and mobile app Device Wall bracket Screws + dowels
